title: Little Sprout GUI
description: A simplistic survival GUI for all your plant-loving needs.
body:
![Animated logo for the Little Sprout resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8f276ba2ada7e06ffc1fd2bc6b4fe573af95aeb.gif)

🌱🌿 Little Sprout GUI is currently in its early stages! It is fully compatible and stackable with other GUI resource packs. 🌱🌿

## **Latest Version Features:**
- Survival GUI
- Hotbar (Offhand(s) included)
- All Heart Icons + Hardcore
- Food Icons
- Armor Icons
- Air Icons
- Crosshair
- Experience Bar 
- Effect Backgrounds (Ambient and Regular)
- Recipe Book Icon ONLY
- Skeleton-Themed Armor Slot Icons

## **Does NOT Currently Include:**
- Creative Inventory GUI(s)
- Achievement GUI
- Crafting/Item Interface GUI
- Settings Interface
- Recipe Book Interface
- Other Features Unlisted

### **FAQ:**

**How do I use this resource pack?**

↳ Place this resource pack **above** all other packs that include GUI changes. If you're unsure which packs include GUI, I'd suggest just placing it at the top of your list.
